name: golang-github-nkovacs-streamquote-dev
title: golang-github-nkovacs-streamquote-dev
summary: Go package providing a streaming version of strconv.Quote
description:
Go package providing a streaming version of strconv.Quote
This package provides a streaming version of strconv.Quote.
.
It allows you to quote the data in an io.Reader and write it out to an
io.Writer without having to store the entire input and the entire output
in memory.
.
Its primary use case is go.rice (https://github.com/GeertJohan/go.rice)
and similar tools, which need to convert lots of files, some of them
quite large, to go strings.
.
converter := streamquote.New()
converter.Convert(inputfile, outfile)
.
Unlike strconv.Quote, it does not add quotes around the output.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-nkovacs-streamquote-dev because Go package providing a streaming version of strconv.Quote.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-nkovacs-streamquote-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-nkovacs-streamquote-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-nkovacs-streamquote-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
